title: Form Validation Event
description: Event emitted when form validation is performed. Contains the validation results and component context.

sections.title: Class Definition
sections.description: The AXFormValidationEvent class definition showing inheritance from AXEvent

props.name: component
props.description: The sender component. Inherited from AXEvent.

props.name: htmlElement
props.description: The root native element. Inherited from AXEvent.

props.name: isUserInteraction
props.description: Indicates if the event was triggered by user interaction. Inherited from AXEvent.

props.name: result
props.description: The validation results containing the overall result and per-rule results.
